summary: Verified the 4 new features: (1) accuracy report share flow — backend pytest (5/5) + curl green (freeze→public GET contains all 3 phrases, revoke kills link, invalid token 404); (2) public /r/{token} page renders data-testid accuracy-share-page + accuracy-share-frozen-badge + iframe accuracy-share-report-frame; invalid token shows accuracy-share-error; (3) PWA assets all 200 (icon-192, icon-512, apple-touch-icon, favicon.ico, manifest.json); (4) Customer Quote sub-lines on estimate c898dbab — quote-adder-* and quote-opening-adder-* render indented with '× qty' and NO dollar prices, WINDOWS section (quote-windows-openings) renders with the Vero Kitchen opening + its adders as sub-lines, total unchanged at $6,185.98; (5) Download PDF (POST /pdf) returns a valid PDF (16.7KB, %PDF magic); (6) ES toggle changes Windows header to 'VENTANAS'. Tape-check-share-report UI button could NOT be reached in a live estimate because TapeCheckPanel only renders inside HouseModel3D (no seeded 3D model on demo or freshly-created estimate) — backend flow proves the endpoint works and source shows the button + shareReport() copy/toast fallback are wired correctly.
action_items: Optional: expose TapeCheckPanel (or a lightweight share-link surface) on estimates without a rendered 3D house model so the Share-Report button is reachable when a scored tape-check run exists but no AI-photo/blueprint 3D model is present. Today the button is functional but gated behind HouseModel3D.
critical_code_review_comments: TapeCheckPanel is mounted only inside HouseModel3D.jsx (line 1758). If an estimate has scored tape-check runs but no 3D model (rare but possible), users cannot reach the Share Report button. Backend supports it either way.
revoke endpoint requires POST body {token}; considered adding token as path param for parity with public GET, but current shape is fine and matches passing tests.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Share Accuracy estimate (f110708c-...) with 1 inserted ai_measure_runs doc, PUT tape-check walls, scored, froze → token; used to verify /r/{token} page; deleted at end (est + runs + snapshot cleaned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend accuracy-share pytest still 5/5. PWA assets served OK. Quote sub-lines & Windows section verified on estimate c898dbab-c8f0-416b-988f-50f5c1fb3d84 — DO NOT DELETE. PDF export via /api/estimates/{id}/pdf works with new emailQuote.js HTML. TapeCheckPanel is only mounted inside HouseModel3D so the Share button is not exercisable without a rendered 3D model — the underlying endpoint is proven via pytest+curl.
